title: GeofenceEvaluated
description: Public wire shape of the Stackra\Geofencing\Events\GeofenceEvaluated domain event. Fired synchronously by GeofenceService::evaluate() after the geofence_checks row is persisted. Consumed by audit / metric listeners inside the Geofencing module and by feature listeners in staff-clock-in-out, athlete-self-check-in, visitor-auto-log, attendance. Carries TWO polymorphic pointers: subject (WHY the check ran) + fenceable (WHAT it ran against). Breaking changes require a v2 bump + parallel dispatch during migration.

check.description: The persisted geofence_checks row. Immutable in application code.

tenant_id.description: Owning tenant identifier. Always set by tenant scoping.

fenceable_type.description: Snake-case morph alias of the fenced entity (from #[Geofenceable]).

fenceable_id.description: Application-generated ID of the fenceable entity.

mode.description: Enforcement mode that produced the verdict.

distance_to_fence_m.description: Signed meters to the fence boundary; 0 or negative when inside. Null on SKIPPED / ERROR.

accuracy_m.description: Reported horizontal accuracy in meters (from the client).

subject_type.description: Snake-case morph alias of the caller entity (from #[GeofenceSubjectAlias]).

subject_id.description: Application-generated ID of the subject entity.

input.description: The originating request DTO. Carried so listeners can log caller-supplied fields without re-parsing the raw HTTP body.
